name: Stroud Resources Ltd.
summary: Stroud Resources Ltd., a junior resource company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties in Mexico and Canada. The company operates in two segments, Mineral Exploration; and Oil and Gas Exploration and Development. It explores for silver and gold deposits. The company holds a 100% interest in Santo Domingo silver-gold project located in the State of Jalisco, Mexico; and a 3.75% interest in six natural gas producing wells in central Alberta, Canada. It also has interests in Hislop Gold Project and Leckie Gold Project.Stroud Resources Ltd. was incorporated in 1983 and is based in Toronto, Canada.
